# Report Builder Project Setup Instructions

This is a Next.js 14 full-stack analytical report builder with MySQL integration.

## Project Overview
- **Framework**: Next.js 14 with TypeScript
- **Frontend**: React with Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui components
- **Database**: MySQL connection with schema introspection
- **Features**: Drag-and-drop report builder, charts, tables, PDF/Excel/CSV export

## Setup Progress Checklist

- [x] Project scaffolding initiated
- [x] Create project structure and files
- [x] Install dependencies
- [x] Configure database connection module
- [x] Build report builder components
- [x] Create API routes for database operations
- [x] Project builds successfully
- [x] Development server running on http://localhost:3000

## Key Features to Implement
1. Database connection modal (form and connection string)
2. Schema browser (tables, columns, data types)
3. Drag-and-drop report designer
4. Chart and table widgets
5. Data preview and export

## Technology Stack
- Next.js 14
- React 18
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS
- shadcn/ui
- mysql2/promise
- Recharts (charts)
- React Beautiful DnD (drag-drop)
- PDF export libraries
